name: websim.pollinations.ai
description: Worker-backed Websim app for generating shareable HTML pages with Pollinations.

scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler dev worker.js --local
scripts.build: npm run build:deps && npm run build:app
scripts.build:deps: npm run build --prefix ../../packages/sdk && npm run build --prefix ../../packages/ui
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy worker.js
